goal: I don't know what to deploy yet, can you suggest the best option?

decision_payload.reasoning: FORGE recommends the docker_compose strategy based on the project scan and goal. This is the best starting point for now, and you can move to Kubernetes later if traffic or service complexity grows. Watch for configuration drift between local and production environments.
requirements: Review the generated files before applying them to production
Set required runtime credentials and environment variables
Run local smoke tests before deploying
what_will_be_generated: Dockerfile and/or compose file when containerization is selected
Kubernetes manifests and CI workflow when Kubernetes is selected
Supplemental deployment files for the selected target
